why: How similar are the conditions the human and the VLM judge were asked to separate?
conclusion: A and B differ in 0.084% of pixels and score 0.9991 whole-image SSIM, yet one carries the brand's real mark and the other a fabricated one. Global metrics and holistic VLM judges are structurally blind to a signal this small; region-scoped geometry separates the same pair 0.213 vs 0.670. This is why the protected region, not the picture, is what gets measured.
